Simulation-Based Agent (Sb-A): Generation of HLAFs (H) corresponding to Sub-Step (Si) requires a recursive process of simulation-based trial, error evaluation, and adjustment such as picking, grasping, ...
Parameter-Based Agent (Pb-A): Generation of HLAFs (H) corresponding to Sub-step (Si) requires a parametric (based on architecturaldesign) procedure
Collaborative Agent (Co-A): Generation of HLAFs (H) corresponding to Sub-step (Si) requires a collaborative procedure
